commitment_policy: Every external promise must map to an implemented control, published limitation, or explicit blocker. Unsupported promises are rejected by legal:commitments:validate.

clauses.text: Logres/Genemed is for research and education only.
Clinical diagnosis, treatment, patient-care, and autonomous causal-gene determination are prohibited.
Users must not submit identifiable patient data or protected health information.
No payments, billing, or paid-service activation are implemented by default.
The repository does not claim HIPAA compliance by default.
SOC 2 readiness artifacts are not certification or independent audit evidence.
No uptime, service-level, support-response, liability cap, jurisdiction, or dispute-resolution term is selected in Git.
A DPA template can be prepared for counsel review without claiming GDPR sufficiency.
BAA necessity is not universally asserted and requires counsel/customer workflow review.
Research publication, IP ownership, and dataset restrictions require written agreement terms reviewed by qualified counsel.
